rationale: The citing paper references Grewal et al. (2010) only once in the theory section, as part of a parenthetical citation supporting a general claim that advertising can improve postpurchase confidence/satisfaction. It does not adopt or test the cited paper's specific satisfaction heterogeneity framework, shareholder-value model, data, or estimation approach. The cited work is not discussed as a central pillar of hypotheses or contribution, so its role is a passing background support citation.
